speaker: speaker1
text: Hey , Tom , did you enjoy your lunch ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , don't mention it . It was terrible .

speaker: speaker2
text: The food station was as crowded as usual . I waited for 20 minutes for my sandwich , and when I finally got it the chicken was underdone .

speaker: speaker1
text: I see . You simply can't blame the server for this .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I know . Fast food is so popular in this district .

speaker: speaker2
text: Anyway , how was your such , Catherine ?

speaker: speaker1
text: It was good . I brought lunch from home today .

speaker: speaker2
text: You did ? I thought you must feel right at home here as we get as many fast food restaurants as you do in America .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , I personally don't like them because I don't believe that they are healthy .

speaker: speaker2
text: I guess you're right . More often than not , people go there only for convenience . The foods may taste good , but generally speaking , they are high in calories , salt and fat .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes . I am wondering that you must believe fast food is our lifestyle , don't you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: You bet . Almost all top brands such as McDonald's and KFC are from America .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , actually two-thirds of Americans may avoid these places .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yeah , it's hard to believe but true .
